description: Python .venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1 is regenerated with local machine path by "python -m venv". The .venv/ directory should be covered by .gitignore to prevent machine-specific paths from entering source control. Verify .gitignore excludes .venv/, .venv-pygame312/, and any other venv folders.
title: .venv/ should be in .gitignore (Activate.ps1 is auto-generated)
resolution: ALREADY PRESENT: .venv/ is already in .gitignore at line 14
